home.heroTitle: Supporting organizations and businesses through AI Training, Adoption and Technical Implementation
home.introTitle: Our focuses for the next five years
home.introText: AIRI Foundation bridges the gap between artificial intelligence and everyday life, making AI education accessible for Canadian communities through research-backed programs and practical training that delivers measurable impact.
home.programsDesc1: Our workshops equip working professionals with practical AI skills through hands-on training, from foundational concepts to advanced applications in their specific industry.
home.programsDesc2: From seniors learning to use AI assistants to newcomers building digital skills, our community programs meet people where they are with accessible, jargon-free education.
home.solutionsSubtitle: Tell us what you need. We'll figure out the rest.
home.solution1Desc: Custom AI and automation solutions for businesses and organizations — from workflow automation to decision-support systems.
home.solution2Desc: Community programs that treat AI understanding as civic and cultural literacy.
home.solution3Desc: We build custom AI architectures, test them against real-world workloads, and deploy them as fully functional, scalable software.
home.partnersText: Our partnerships connect cutting-edge AI education with real-world communities, driving understanding while ensuring AI development is done responsibly.
home.impactText: Since 2024, AIRI Foundation has been building Canada's AI-literate communities, connecting educators with learners and delivering programs that drive real understanding.
home.ctaTitle: Join our team — explore open positions at AIRI Foundation
home.ctaTeamText: Our team is building Canada's AI-literate future.

impact.joinTitle: Join AIRI and help us make a bigger impact
impact.joinText: Whether you give your time or build your career with us, every contribution moves the needle.
impact.defaultStat1Desc: Canadians equipped with practical AI skills through our workshops, clubs, and community programs since 2024.
impact.defaultStat2Desc: Businesses, nonprofits, and institutions partnering with AIRI for AI solutions and education.
impact.defaultStat4Desc: Hands-on sessions from introductory to advanced.

about.heroSubtitle: Because AI impacts everyone, they deserve to understand and use it well
about.missionText: AIRI Foundation is a non-profit organization that advances AI literacy and workflow automation across Canada. By combining research, consulting, and custom software development with hands-on automation services and training, we empower individuals and businesses to successfully deploy ethical AI solutions in their daily operations.
about.visionText: Every Canadian and organization can access, shape, and benefit from the power of AI to co-create and share in a just and innovative world.
about.whySubtitle: What sets us apart in the AI education space
about.value1Desc: We bring together a team of researchers and AI practitioners from different sectors and industries to help bridge the gap between AI research and its practical application.
about.value2Desc: Our tailored programs is designed to meet the needs every target demography from seniors, youths, professionals to students and academics and researchers.
about.value3Desc: We thrive on building lasting relationships and open collaboration with diverse institutions across our community. This helps us increase our reach and impact with the work we do.
about.value4Desc: We show people that the responsible use of AI is possible as we address issues that bothers on bias, privacy, misinformation and ethical consideration in the solutions we develop.
about.leadershipSubtitle: Meet the team driving AI literacy across Canada
about.internSubtitle: We give young creators the opportunity to to work on real projects and build their AI skills
about.impactText: Since 2024, AIRI Foundation has been building Canada's AI-literate communities, connecting educators with learners and delivering programs that drive real understanding.
about.partnersText: Our partnerships connect cutting-edge AI education with real-world communities, driving understanding while ensuring AI development is done responsibly.
about.ctaTitle: Tell us what you need. We'll figure out the rest.
about.ctaText: Whether you want to learn, partner, or support our mission, there is a place for you.

career.howToApplyIntro: Send your CV to {email} and include the position you are applying for in the email subject. No cover letter is needed.
career.howToApplyAfter: and include the position you are applying for in the email subject. No cover letter is needed.
career.standOutIntro: For all positions, if you want to stand out, include one artifact that shows us something your CV does not:
career.artifact1: A description of a real-world task and an outline of how you would stress-test an AI system on it (what prompts you'd use, what you'd look for, and how you'd decide the system is not safe or reliable enough). Keep it under 1 page.
career.artifact2: A diagram of how you would redesign an everyday process of your choice using AI.
career.artifact3: A 1-page memo imagining a public institution deploying an AI system: lay out the strongest argument for deploying it and the strongest argument against, then state which side you come down on and what evidence would change your mind.
career.artifact4: A small automation or workflow you built that saved real time for you or others (include 3–5 lines of context).
career.artifact5: A short "reverse prompt-engineering" exercise where you show us a bad AI output and explain the hidden assumptions that probably produced it.
career.shortlistedNote: Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
career.locationValue: Downtown Lethbridge, Alberta at 104-519, 7th Street S
career.eligibilityValue: Canadian citizens and permanent residents who are legally entitled to work in Canada
career.pos1Desc: Do you excel at making complex organizations look effortless from the outside? That is exactly what this role demands. We are looking for a detail-oriented person with strong written communication, sound judgment, and the capacity to hold multiple work streams at once — someone who will support our leadership and operations team, produce organizational communications and branded materials, and apply research instincts to the live business and community solutions that AIRI is currently developing.
career.pos1Gain1: Project management in tech sector, executive assistance, consulting, and operations leadership
career.pos1Gain2: Direct mentorship from the AIRI team
career.pos1Gain3: Hands-on experience with a Canadian tech and AI-focused non-profit
career.pos1Gain4: A portfolio of SOPs and systems you personally designed
career.pos1Gain5: A professional reference letter, LinkedIn recommendation, and intern spotlight
career.pos1Gain7: Opportunity to keep working on different projects after the summer term
career.pos1Gain8: Opportunity to build your AI/tech product in AIRI's facility, using our tools
career.pos1Thrive2: Pick up new tools, contexts, and conversations quickly
career.pos1Thrive3: Enjoy researching markets and opportunities and know how to turn what you find into something actionable
career.pos1Thrive4: Are genuinely curious about AI and how organizations grow
career.pos1Thrive5: Care about doing things right without letting perfect become the enemy of done
career.pos2Desc1: You will work at the intersection of applied AI and community impact, building automations and solutions for businesses and partner organizations served through AIRI. Responsibilities include designing and deploying workflow automations, hands-on with large language models and generative AI tools to solve client problems, and contributing to the Foundation's community AI literacy programs.
career.pos2Desc2: The ideal candidates would have technical skill in artificial intelligence, strong problem-solving instincts, comfort moving between technical implementation and plain-language communication, and an attentiveness to the people on the other side of every system they build. Students and recent graduates in computer science, data science, engineering, cognitive science, education, communications, or related fields are encouraged to apply, and so is anyone who has built or deployed something real, regardless of how they got there.
career.pos2Gain1: Production experience building AI automations and model-powered tools that real businesses deploy
career.pos2Gain2: Direct mentorship from the AIRI team
career.pos2Gain3: Exposure to how an AI-focused organization translates model capability into client and community value
career.pos2Gain4: Access to our summer learning series covering AI ethics, model evaluation, and community-centred deployment
career.pos2Gain5: A pathway into continued technical and program work with AIRI beyond the summer term
career.pos2Gain7: Opportunity to build your AI/tech product in AIRI's facility, using our tools
career.pos3Desc1: The Community & Partnerships Fellow will support AIRI's external relationship ecosystem for the summer, identifying and activating partnerships with organizations, institutions, businesses, and community networks. You will develop and execute outreach strategies and co-design community engagement touchpoints for our various projects.
career.pos3Desc2: We are looking for someone who excels at making things happen across organizational lines, whether in student government, community organizing, campus media, the nonprofit sector, or corporate business.
career.pos3Gain1: Build a partnership portfolio from zero to active
career.pos3Gain2: Get in the room with funders, policymakers, executive directors, and community leaders who are shaping how AI gets governed and deployed in Canada
career.pos3Gain3: Learn how organizations with client base and a community mandate makes strategic decisions and creates solutions
career.pos3Gain4: 20+ hours of structured professional development in partnership strategy, stakeholder communications, and nonprofit leadership
career.pos3Gain5: A pathway into continued strategic and program work with AIRI beyond the summer
career.pos3Gain6: A written reference and LinkedIn endorsement
career.pos3Gain7: Opportunity to build your AI/tech product in AIRI's facility, using our tools
career.pos4Desc: You will support AIRI's revenue growth by working across grants and institutional funding and business development for AI solutions.
career.pos4CoreFunc1: Map, identify, and track grant and funding opportunities that fit AIRI's mission
career.pos4CoreFunc2: Turn program ideas into clear proposals, including narratives, basic budgets, and supporting materials
career.pos4CoreFunc3: Maintain a live, prioritized list of organizations that could use AIRI's AI solutions, and keep that list moving
career.pos4CoreFunc4: Join outreach and pitch calls, take useful notes, and help move conversations from "interesting" to concrete next steps
career.pos4CoreFunc5: Contribute to live founder-led ventures and help maintain a simple, accurate pipeline for both funders and clients
career.pos4Func1: Map, identify, and track grant and funding opportunities that fit AIRI's mission
career.pos4Func2: Turn program ideas into clear proposals, including narratives, basic budgets, and supporting materials
career.pos4Func3: Maintain a live, prioritized list of organizations that could use AIRI's AI solutions, and keep that list moving
career.pos4Func4: Join outreach and pitch calls, take useful notes, and help move conversations from "interesting" to concrete next steps
career.pos4Func5: Contribute to live founder-led ventures and help maintain a simple, accurate pipeline for both funders and clients
career.pos4Gain2: Contribute meaningfully to multiple signed client engagements
career.pos4Gain3: Deliver a concise growth plan (funding + client pipeline) for the next 6–12 months
career.pos4Gain4: Direct collaboration with the Executive Director and senior team
career.pos4Gain5: Regular participation in external meetings with funders and prospective clients
career.pos4Gain6: Ongoing feedback on writing and pipeline management
career.pos4Gain8: Opportunity to build your AI/tech product in AIRI's facility, using our tools
career.pos4Ideal1: You write clearly under pressure and do not need three rounds of feedback to get there
career.pos4Ideal2: Your writing makes decisions easy for the person reading it
career.pos4Ideal3: You have moved something from idea to outcome
career.pos4Ideal4: You have some experience with grant writing (formal or informal)
career.pos4Ideal5: You are comfortable with quantitative reasoning
career.pos4Ideal6: You are genuinely interested in AI and how organizations grow

contact.heroSubtitle: Ready to explore AI education for your team, community, or organization? We would love to hear from you.

donate.heroSubtitle: Your contribution directly funds AI education programs for communities across Canada who need it most.
donate.tier1Impact: Provides learning materials for one workshop participant
donate.tier2Impact: Sponsors a student through our 12-week Code & AI Club
donate.tier3Impact: Funds a full community workshop for up to 30 participants
donate.taxText: AIRI Foundation is a registered Canadian nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. You will receive a tax receipt via email after your donation is processed through our secure partner, Zeffy.

volunteer.role4Desc: Support our research on AI education effectiveness.
volunteer.applyText: Tell us about yourself and how you would like to contribute. We review applications on a rolling basis.

programs.heroSubtitle: From boardrooms to community centers, our programs are designed for diverse learners at every stage of their AI journey.
programs.profDesc: Custom AI and automation solutions for businesses and organizations. We discover inefficiencies, architect solutions, and deploy tools your team can operate independently — no vendor lock-in.
programs.profFeat1: Workflow automation and internal AI tools
programs.profFeat3: Industry-specific AI applications and use cases
programs.profFeat4: Online AI literacy courses for organizational teams
programs.youthDesc: A free hands-on program for students from all backgrounds to master Python, explore Artificial Intelligence, and start building for the future. In partnership with the University of Lethbridge and BIPOC Foundation.
programs.youthFeat2: Python, AI basics, and machine learning exploration
programs.youthFeat3: Hands-on projects: games, chatbots, data analysis
programs.immDesc: Programs helping newcomers navigate the digital landscape and understand how AI reshapes work, culture, and everyday life — treating AI education as civic literacy, not just technical training.
programs.immFeat1: How AI systems function and their limitations
programs.immFeat2: Practical AI tools for settlement and employment
programs.immFeat3: Live sessions and structured online courses
programs.senSubtitle: Accessible AI education for older adults
programs.senDesc: Patient, accessible workshops help older adults understand and use AI tools in their daily lives — from smart assistants to health applications to staying connected with family.
programs.senFeat1: Small group sessions with personal support
programs.senFeat4: Delivered at libraries and community centers
programs.ctaText: Whether you are looking to train your team, enroll in a program, or partner with us — we are here to help.

solutions.heroSubtitle: Tell us what you need. We'll figure out the rest.
solutions.opLabel: Discover. Design. Build. Deploy. Integrate. Deliver
solutions.opText1: Your competition isn't using AI because it's trendy. They're using it because it works. And if you're still trying to figure out where to start, you're already behind.
solutions.opText2: We work with businesses and organizations (including non-profits) that know something needs to change but aren't sure what that looks like. You can see the work piling up. You know parts of your operation should be automated. You know there's a better way to run things. What's missing is a clear path from intention to execution.
solutions.opText3: We design and build custom AI and automation solutions.
solutions.opText4: Our work includes workflow automation, internal AI tools, system integration, and decision-support systems built around real operational needs.
solutions.opDo1: Work directly with your team to identify bottlenecks, inefficiencies, and high-friction processes, then design systems that fit how you actually work.
solutions.opDo2: Architect, develop, and deploy custom automation and AI systems.
solutions.opDo3: Integrate new tools into your existing workflows, platforms, and governance structures.
solutions.opDo4: Your team learns to operate, maintain, and extend these systems themselves. No vendor lock-in. No endless retainers.
solutions.opDo5: Design and deliver online AI literacy courses for professionals and organizational teams who need a clear, operational understanding of how AI affects decision-making, workflows, and accountability.
solutions.opOutro1: If you're willing to question how things have always been done, we'll show you what's possible.
solutions.opOutro2: Our job is to equip your team with the skills and tools that let them focus on work that actually requires human judgment and care.
solutions.civicText1: We work with community members who want to understand how AI is reshaping work, culture, and everyday life, and who don't want that understanding outsourced to hype or fear.
solutions.civicText2: Explore <seniors> AI for Seniors</seniors> or join the <club>Code & AI Club</club>.
solutions.civicText3: These sessions are designed for people across ages, backgrounds, and professions because AI now cuts across every domain of life. Workplaces, schools, creative practice, public services, and personal decision-making are already being reorganized around these systems.
solutions.civicText4: We don't approach this as basic "AI literacy" — instead we treat it as civic and cultural literacy.
solutions.civicText5: Participants engage with how AI systems actually work, where their limits are, and how they are being deployed in ways that shape power, labor, and opportunity. We examine real uses, trade-offs, and real consequences. Participants get to understand the conditions under which these technologies are introduced, normalized, and resisted, and what room still exists for human agency, responsibility, and choice.
solutions.civicText6: In addition to live sessions, we develop online AI literacy courses for community members who want a structured, accessible way to understand how AI shapes work, creativity, public services, and everyday life.
solutions.civicText7: These sessions are for people who want to be informed participants in the world they already inhabit.
solutions.rdText1: AIRI's Research and Development unit designs and delivers implementation-ready AI systems for use in real institutional and community settings.
solutions.rdText2: Our work advances scalable solutions at the intersection of artificial intelligence, organizational practice, and social impact. Research here is oriented toward deployment, long-term use, and adaptation under real constraints.
solutions.rdText3: Over the next five years, our work is guided by five priorities that shape both technical development and applied research.
solutions.rdPriority1: Current work includes building and piloting the Display Governance Protocol (DGP), alongside internal workflow systems for non-profits and public organizations that operationalize visual-AI governance, compliance, and accountability inside existing institutional infrastructure.
solutions.rdPriority3: Low-barrier deployment, enabling adoption across organizations with varied technical capacity.
solutions.rdPriority4: Scalable ethical frameworks, supporting responsible use across organizations and public systems.
solutions.rdPriority5: Strategies to address AI-driven misinformation, with attention to governance, policy, and public resilience.
solutions.rdOutro: A central component of this work involves developing custom workflow systems for non-profits and civil-society organizations. These systems are being designed to be housed internally, with operational features that allow for modification over time as organizational needs change.

codeAiClub.heroSubtitle: In a world being reshaped by artificial intelligence, the children who thrive won't just be users of technology — they'll be the ones who build it. Give your child that edge.
codeAiClub.scheduleVal: Flexible — arranged around your family's availability
codeAiClub.feat1: Program fees apply — pricing is shared upon inquiry Spaces are limited and filled on a first-come, first-served basis. To enroll or ask about tuition, reach out to us directly using the contact button below. We are committed to accessibility — please contact us to discuss your situation
codeAiClub.feat4: BIPOC students and girls in STEM highly encouraged
codeAiClub.ctaText: 25 seats. Real skills. A head start that lasts a lifetime. Reach out now — our team will walk you through enrollment, tuition, and scheduling so your child can start building their future.

seniors.heroSubtitle: Seniors didn't ask for an AI revolution — but they deserve to navigate it with dignity, confidence, and the tools to protect what matters most. Our SafeAge Canada program meets you exactly where you are, with accessible, jargon-free education that builds real confidence.
seniors.topic1: Using AI assistants for daily tasks
seniors.topic3: Understanding AI in news and media
seniors.topic4: Staying safe online with AI-powered tools
seniors.topic5: Practical applications for health and wellbeing
seniors.topic6: Communicating with family through digital tools
seniors.topic1Desc: Understanding Artificial Intelligence — What AI actually is, how it processes information differently from human judgment, what it genuinely costs to use in money, data, and privacy — and where it helps vs. where it should never be trusted to decide alone.
seniors.topic2Desc: How AI reasons, responds, and makes decisions, including the art of prompt engineering and how to evaluate AI-generated content with an informed, discerning eye.
seniors.topic3Desc: Using AI as a creative partner to transform personal memories and lived experiences into illustrated stories and lasting family memoirs — preserving what matters most in forms that can be shared across generations.
seniors.topic4Desc: How to recognize and resist AI-powered scams, phishing schemes, and social engineering tactics — building the vigilance needed to protect personal information in an increasingly deceptive digital landscape.
seniors.topic5Desc: Hands-on training to identify AI-generated voice clones, manipulated images, and fabricated video content.
seniors.topic6Desc: The essentials of digital self-protection — robust password practices, two-factor authentication, and a clear-eyed understanding of what AI platforms collect and retain about their users — so participants can engage with technology entirely on their own terms.
seniors.howText: Small group sessions designed specifically for seniors. Patient, hands-on instruction with no prior technical experience required. Available at community centers and libraries across Lethbridge.
seniors.partnerText: Delivered in partnership with NordBridge Senior Centre and Lethbridge Public Library.
seniors.ctaText: No experience needed. Just curiosity and a willingness to learn.

professionals.heroSubtitle: Our workshops equip working professionals and organizations with practical AI skills through hands-on training, from foundational concepts to advanced applications in their specific industry.
professionals.cover1: Workflow automation and internal AI tools
professionals.cover3: Industry-specific AI applications and use cases

professionals.cover6: Building systems your team can operate independently
professionals.approachText: We work with your organization to discover inefficiencies, design solutions, build and deploy custom AI tools, and integrate them into your existing workflows. Your team learns to operate, maintain, and extend these systems — no vendor lock-in.
professionals.ctaText: Let us help your organization build real AI capabilities from the ground up.

newCanadians.heroSubtitle: Tailored specifically for newcomers to Canada, these programs help new Canadians navigate the digital landscape and build confidence with AI tools that matter in everyday life.
newCanadians.cover1: How AI systems actually function and their limitations
newCanadians.cover4: Human agency and choice in AI-driven contexts
newCanadians.cover5: Practical AI tools for settlement and employment
newCanadians.howText: Available as live sessions and structured online courses for community members across ages and professions. We treat AI education as civic and cultural literacy — not just technical training.
newCanadians.ctaText: New sessions are offered regularly. Get in touch to learn about upcoming dates and locations.
